case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS FAJARDO SANTOS GENARO

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FAJARDO SANTOS GENARO

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAJARDO SANTOS GENARO $316.22 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $356.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO FAJARDO SANTOS GENARO RETURNED TO SENDER NOT KNOWN
